name: PDF to Chinese LaTeX
description_en: Translate academic PDFs in any language into Chinese LaTeX projects that compile in Overleaf with XeLaTeX, preserving equations, tables, figures, and bibliography one-to-one.
description_zh: 把任意语种的学术 PDF 论文翻译成可在 Overleaf 用 XeLaTeX 编译的中文 LaTeX 工程,公式、表格、图片与参考文献逐一对应保留。
long_en: Keeps equation numbering and reference alignment intact, producing an Overleaf-ready Chinese version of foreign-language papers.
long_zh: 保持公式编号与引用对齐不变,产出可直接用于 Overleaf 的外文论文中文版。
sec_note_en: Sends paper text to a translation step; review the translation for technical accuracy.
sec_note_zh: 会把论文文本送入翻译环节;请审阅译文的技术准确性。
